selected.name: Xvfb
rationale: Only backend whose screen geometry we control. A window cannot exceed its screen: row 3 was clamped to 1280x771 by the probe's 1280x800 Xvfb screen. size-matrix needs 2560x1440, so the Xvfb screen is created larger than tj's real display, which rows 1-2 could not satisfy.

Screen geometry is driven by BOTH matrix consumers: it must fit max(size-matrix's largest content entry, scale-matrix's logical baseline x max scale) PLUS window decoration. The driver resizes by CONTENT size (setContentSize, for parity with Tier A's page.setViewportSize) and a window cannot exceed its screen. size-matrix's largest is 2560x1440 content at 1x; scale-matrix pins a 1440x900 DIP baseline and its largest is 2880x1800 physical at 2x. 2880x1800 wins, so the screen is 2920x1860x24 — 40x60 of decoration headroom over it. Undersizing here does not error, it silently clamps: a 2600x1500 screen capped the 2x row at 2600x1480, which at DPR 2 is only 1300x740 logical — below the app's own 768 minimum height, i.e. a layout no real user could ever see. ~22MB of virtual framebuffer is an irrelevant cost next to that.
Deterministic: rows 1 and 2 disagreed on window height (835 vs 871) due to compositor decoration variance.
Invisible and session-independent — no windows on tj's desktop, works from tty/ssh/cron. Rows 1-2 require a live login session.
No XAUTHORITY fragility: row 2 needs a per-session random /run/user/1000/.mutter-Xwaylandauth.<rand> cookie.
No speed cost: all three working rows landed at ~1.6s.

fallback.name: native Wayland
fallback.when: interactive debugging — puts a real window on tj's desktop

rejected.name: ozone headless
rejected.why: never creates a window; launch times out at 45s (main process starts, CDP attaches, no window)

selected.decidedBy: Opus (orchestrator), 2026-07-15, from the full probe matrix

notes: ready-to-show never fires under any backend when driven by Playwright (index.ts:146 gates win.show() on it). All drivers MUST force show via app.evaluate() — this is not backend-specific.

Display env is never inherited (shell has empty DISPLAY/WAYLAND_DISPLAY, XDG_SESSION_TYPE=tty). Sockets must be discovered and set explicitly. This likely contributed to the 2026-06-04 attempt's failure.
